name: Boot Camp
introDialog: Welcome, recruit! Let's learn the basics of combat.
victoryDialog: You've completed basic training! You're ready for battle.

tutorialSteps.title: Fire!
tutorialSteps.description: Hold Left Mouse to charge, release to fire!

tutorialSteps.title: Switch Weapon
tutorialSteps.description: Press 2 to switch to the Rocket.

tutorialSteps.title: Use Skill
tutorialSteps.description: Press Q to use your Teleport skill!

tutorialSteps.title: Switch to Drill
tutorialSteps.description: Press 4 to select the Drill weapon.

tutorialSteps.title: Destroy Terrain
tutorialSteps.description: Fire the Drill into the ground to carve a path!

tutorialSteps.title: Eliminate the Target
tutorialSteps.description: Use any weapon to defeat the training dummy!
